title: is-a.software
description: A subdomain service providing **free, easy-to-configure subdomains** for developer projects.
details: is-a.software lets developers claim free subdomains like yourproject.is-a.software. Built with a GitHub Actions-powered pipeline that automatically provisions DNS records when a PR is merged. Supports custom configuration via JSON files in each project's repository.

title: DevProfiles
description: A platform to list your developer profile, **showcase skills**, and connect with other developers.
details: DevProfiles is a community-driven directory where developers can create profiles, highlight their tech stack, and discover others with similar interests. Features include profile search, skill-based filtering, and a clean minimal interface.
